# Hash Utility Module

Implement a hash utility module that computes cryptographic hash digests for string inputs.

## Capabilities

### Compute hash digest

Given a string message and an algorithm name, return the digest of the message in the requested output encoding.

- Given the message `"hello"` and algorithm `"sha256"`, return the hex digest `"2cf24dba5fb0a30e26e83b2ac5b9e29e1b161e5c1fa7425e73043362938b9824"` [@test](./tests/hash-hex.test.js)
- Given the message `"hello"` and algorithm `"md5"`, return the hex digest `"5d41402abc4b2a76b9719d911017c592"` [@test](./tests/hash-md5.test.js)
- Given the message `"hello"` and algorithm `"sha1"`, return the base64 digest `"qvTGHdzF6KLavt4PO0gs2a6pQ00="` when encoding is `"base64"` [@test](./tests/hash-base64.test.js)
- Given the message `""` (empty string) and algorithm `"sha256"`, return the hex digest `"e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855"` [@test](./tests/hash-empty.test.js)

## Implementation

[@generates](./src/index.js)

## API

```javascript { #api }
/**
 * Compute a hash digest of a string message.
 * @param {string} algorithm - Hash algorithm (e.g. "sha256", "md5", "sha1")
 * @param {string} message - Input message to hash
 * @param {string} [encoding="hex"] - Output encoding ("hex", "base64", or "binary")
 * @returns {string} The hash digest
 */
export function computeHash(algorithm, message, encoding = "hex");
```

## Dependencies { .dependencies }

### crypto-browserify { .dependency }

Provides browser-compatible implementation of Node.js's `crypto` module for hashing.

[@satisfied-by](crypto-browserify)
